creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Brad D from comment #6)

Hi Brad,

If I quick follow the path history your first patch creates

devel/tinyfd/Makefile
devel/tinyfd/distinfo
devel/tinyfd/pkg-descr

After that you do some changes and improvements then
in you last patch you move devel/tinyfd to x11/tinyfd

rename {devel => x11}/tinyfd/distinfo
rename {devel => x11}/tinyfd/pkg-descr
rename {devel => x11}/tinyfd/pkg-plist

I just need a single patch who install the final files without
having to process the full set of obsolete patches.

Thanks
